mission: Fix CMT scale-saturation bug discovered at Mk.XII v2 Phase 3a (#237)
helper_v3_canonical_note: v3-default merge (axis 96 disambiguation): single canonical helper, ANIMA_CMT_MODE in {v3,v2,v1} with default v3 (MLP-only + residual-passthrough). Legacy v1 SHA16 above refers to the pre-merge v1 file; current tool/anima_cmt.hexa is the merged v3-default canonical.

fix_design.change_1: register_forward_hook on layer.mlp instead of layer (whole block)
fix_design.rationale_1: v1 zero-ablates entire transformer block → at 12B+ scale final hidden ~= 0 → rel saturates at 1.0; MLP-only preserves attention residual path
fix_design.change_2: add scale-invariant norm_dy = abs / sqrt(h_dim) alongside abs/rel
fix_design.change_3: saturation_frac diagnostic in summary (count of cells with rel>=0.99)
fix_design.rationale_3: gate now requires informative=True (saturation_frac<0.5) AND dominant rel>=0.05
fix_design.env_compat: ANIMA_ABLATE_TARGET=layer falls back to v1 behavior for A/B comparison

saturation_pattern_v1.note: Qwen3-14B variable (rel 0.05-0.34) at 14B suggests architecture-specific saturation, not pure scale

verdict_rationale: pure magnitude renormalization (HCSF-A) cannot fix rel=1.0 because Y_abl≈0 → rel→1 regardless of normalization. MLP-only sub-module ablation (HCSF-B) addresses the root cause: preserves attention path so Y_abl != 0. HCSF-C (gemma hybrid attention) cannot be sole cause because Mistral-Nemo (non-hybrid) also fully saturates.
in_vivo_retest_blockers: $0.50 cap insufficient for full 5-bb GPU re-launch (~$0.50-0.85)
in_vivo_retest_plan: Phase 3a-followup cycle: re-run 5-bb (Mistral-7B + Mistral-Nemo-12B + Qwen3-8B + Qwen3-14B + gemma-2-9b) with v2 helper, ANIMA_ABLATE_TARGET=mlp default. Validate (a) 12B+ saturation_frac drops <0.5, (b) 7B baseline stays informative, (c) dominant layer per family still surfaces. Estimated $0.50-0.85 GPU.
raw_10_honest_caveats: N=2 12B+ sample (Mistral-Nemo + gemma) for saturation hypothesis — generalize cautiously to other 12B+ architectures
Qwen3-14B at v1 was already informative — suggests 12B alone is not sufficient cause; backbone-specific factors matter
MLP-only ablation is one of several possible fixes (attention-only, residual-path-partial, layer-norm-disabled would also work and may give different tomography)
pre-registered v2 helper has not been validated in vivo — analysis-only verdict pending GPU retest
rel_distribution.std/mean is the proper saturation discriminator; saturation_frac<0.5 is conservative threshold (50% threshold may need tightening to 0.3 or 0.1)
